flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at California State University-Sacramento rose 18% between 2007 and 2010 ($9.3k → $11.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at California State University-Sacramento fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at California State University-Sacramento rose 38% between 2021 and 2024 (20.3% → 28.1%).
